headline: Lemma B Phase-2 Step 3b: skeleton-Laplacian spectral-gap audit. Tests whether the unweighted skeleton A_skel = 1[Xi > 0.10] has the same uniform spectral gap as the weighted Laplacian of prop:sg_empirical.
method: Per snapshot: skeleton A_skel = 1[Xi(i,j) > 0.10], symmetrised, zero-diagonal. Normalised graph Laplacians L_w and L_skel computed on weighted Xi and on A_skel respectively. lambda_2 = second-smallest eigenvalue. Per regime: cross-seed mean + bootstrap-95% CI. Symanzik-1 + const N-scaling fits with AICc selection.
